description_long: This house features a prominent multi-tiered gable roof with wide overhangs and a brown finish, giving it a classic suburban appearance. The front facade includes a covered porch with white railings and a central staircase leading up to the main entryway, which is flanked by shuttered windows. The upper story has a dormer with additional windows, adding architectural interest and natural light to the upper level. The side views reveal the house's rectangular footprint and the extension of the porch along one side, as well as the consistent use of white and brown color schemes. The rear of the house is simpler, with fewer windows and no porch, emphasizing privacy. The overall structure suggests a wood-framed construction with a spacious, family-oriented layout.
description: A two-story house with a multi-tiered brown gable roof, white railings, a covered front porch, and shuttered windows, blending classic suburban and Craftsman elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch with white railings, central staircase, and upper dormer with shuttered windows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the extended porch, overhanging roof, and minimal window placement.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain facade, minimal windows, and no porch, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the porch extension, overhanging roof, and a few side windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, covered porch, white railings, and decorative shutters
